mapper.select:
SELECT
IFNULL(SUM( CASE WHEN DATE(o.created_at) = CURDATE() THEN o.total_price ELSE 0 END ),0) AS todaySales,
COUNT( CASE WHEN DATE(o.created_at) = CURDATE() THEN o.order_id END ) AS todayOrders,
IFNULL(SUM( CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at,'%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y-%m') THEN o.total_price ELSE 0 END ),0) AS monthlySales,
IFNULL(SUM( CASE WHEN DATE(o.created_at) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN o.total_price ELSE 0 END ),0) AS yesterdaySales,
IFNULL(AVG(o.total_price),0) AS averageOrderPrice,
COUNT( CASE WHEN o.order_status IN ('완료','COMPLETED') THEN o.order_id END ) AS completedOrders
FROM orders o
WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('취소','CANCELLED')

SELECT
m.menu_name AS menuName,
SUM(oi.quantity) AS orderCount
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN menus m ON oi.menu_id = m.menu_id
WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('취소','CANCELLED')
GROUP BY m.menu_id, m.menu_name
ORDER BY orderCount DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT
DATE(o.created_at) AS salesDate,
COUNT(o.order_id) AS orderCount,
SUM(o.total_price) AS totalSales
FROM orders o
WHERE o.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 30 DAY)
AND o.order_status NOT IN ('취소','CANCELLED')
GROUP BY DATE(o.created_at)
ORDER BY salesDate ASC
